grades.expectation: Response mentions checking competentperson.co.uk to verify if installer was registered
grades.reason: Explicitly mentions checking competentperson.co.uk and explains the search purpose

grades.expectation: Response mentions FENSA specifically as the relevant competent person scheme for windows
grades.reason: Clearly identifies FENSA as one of the two main competent person schemes for windows

grades.expectation: Response distinguishes between self-certification (competent person) and local authority routes
grades.reason: Clearly distinguishes between FENSA/CERTASS certification and building control approval as separate routes

grades.expectation: Response warns about the 'no approach' rule before pursuing indemnity insurance
grades.reason: Explicitly warns that contacting building control makes indemnity insurance unavailable and emphasizes deciding strategy first

grades.expectation: Response mentions Part L (energy efficiency/insulation) as relevant regulation for windows
grades.reason: Specifically mentions Part L (energy efficiency/thermal performance) as the relevant Building Regulations requirement
